author.summary: I blog about web development, ideas, and my daily journey as an aspiring software engineer.

description: A personal blog by Jeff Yang.

home.title: Hi! I'm Jeff 👋
home.description: I’m a Northwestern senior looking to make positive impact on the world through code. This space looks to achieve even a fraction of that goal and learn from others in turn. Thank you for stopping by, and enjoy!
